title: Hypertelis pusilla
taxonomy: Hypertelis pusilla is a species of plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. This family includes plants commonly known as forget-me-nots, borage, and heliotrope. The Boraginaceae family is a part of the order Lamiales in the kingdom Plantae. The classification of Hypertelis pusilla is further broken down into the class Magnoliopsida and the phylum Angiospermophyta. The classification reflects the plant's evolutionary relationships and characteristics within the plant kingdom.
